name: lucidmotors
documentation:
# python-lucidmotors

Unofficial Python bindings to the Lucid Motors API. No affiliation with Lucid
Motors.

To install dependencies, assuming you have Python development tools already, run:

```
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

Try fiddling with `examples/vehicle_info.py`. With no arguments it will prompt
for your Lucid username and password, then print out your user profile and
vehicle information.

To generate a test case from your data, visit
[testmycode.cc](https://testmycode.cc). This will log in using your Lucid
account, remove identifying information from the API response, and let you
submit the anonymized data for review.

If you're feeling adventurous, try playing with `examples/test_all_actions.py` which
will run through every action we have figured out out thus far. A "stress test" of
sorts.

modules.name: lucidmotors.const
documentation: Constants for the Lucid Motors API.

modules.name: lucidmotors.exceptions
documentation: Exception types for the Lucid Motors API.

classes.name: lucidmotors.exceptions.APIError
documentation: Represents an error returned by the API

classes.name: lucidmotors.exceptions.APIValueError
documentation: Represents an error in data returned by the API

modules.name: lucidmotors
documentation: The Lucid Motors mobile app API

functions.name: lucidmotors._check_for_api_error
documentation: Transform gRPC errors into APIErrors.

classes.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPIInterceptor

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPIInterceptor.set_credentials
documentation: Set (or clear) the gRPC credentials used for this channel.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPIInterceptor.intercept_unary_unary
documentation: Intercept a unary-unary invocation asynchronously.
RPC interceptor adding token-based authentication.

classes.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the API client

```
param auto_wake

Automatically send a wake request with commands that
```

require it if the vehicle is sleeping.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.session_time_remaining
documentation:
Time remaining before our session would expire without renewal.

Returns timedelta(0) if not logged in yet.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.login
documentation: Authenticate to the API using your Lucid account credentials

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.set_profile_photo
documentation:
Set the logged-in user's profile photo.

Returns the uploaded photo URL on success.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.get_referral_history
documentation: Fetch the logged-in user's referral history.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.authentication_refresh
documentation: Get a fresh new token by using the refresh token.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.close
documentation:
Close the underlying channel. Must be called to free resources if
this object is not used as a context manager.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.user
documentation: Return the logged-in user's profile information

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.vehicles
documentation:
Return a cached list of the logged-in user's Vehicles.
Note: To get fresh vehicle information, call .fetch_vehicles()

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.fetch_vehicles
documentation: Refresh the list (and status) of vehicles from the API.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.vehicle_is_awake
documentation:
Returns `True` if `vehicle` was awake (i.e. responding to commands) as
of the last status update.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.wakeup_vehicle
documentation: Wake up a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.honk_horn
documentation: Honk the horn of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.lights_control
documentation: Control the lights of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.lights_on
documentation: Turn on the lights of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.lights_off
documentation: Turn off the lights of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.lights_flash
documentation: Flash the lights of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.charge_port_control
documentation: Control the charge port door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.charge_port_open
documentation: Open the charge port door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.charge_port_close
documentation: Close the charge port door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.door_locks_control
documentation: Control the doors of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.doors_unlock
documentation: Open the doors of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.doors_lock
documentation: Close the doors of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.frunk_control
documentation: Control the frunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.frunk_open
documentation: Open the frunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.frunk_close
documentation: Close the frunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.trunk_control
documentation: Control the trunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.trunk_open
documentation: Open the trunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.trunk_close
documentation: Close the trunk door of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.defrost_control
documentation: Control the defrost mode of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.defrost_on
documentation: Turn on the defrost mode of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.defrost_off
documentation: Turn off the defrost mode of a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.set_cabin_temperature
documentation:
Set cabin temperature (in celcius) for preconditioning.
Disables preconditioning if temperature is None.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.battery_precon_control
documentation: Control battery preconditioning for a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.battery_precon_on
documentation: Turn on battery preconditioning for a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.battery_precon_off
documentation: Turn off battery preconditioning for a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.get_update_release_notes
documentation:
Fetch release notes and description given a software version, e.g.
'2.1.47'.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.get_owners_manual
documentation: Fetch owner's manual URL given a software version, e.g. '2.1.47'.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.apply_update
documentation:
Apply an available software update. Target version cannot be chosen, it
will always be the latest update available to the car.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.set_charge_limit
documentation: Set the charge limit for a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.charging_control
documentation: Enable or disable charging for a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.start_charging
documentation: Start charging a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.stop_charging
documentation: Stop charging a specific vehicle.

methods.name: lucidmotors.LucidAPI.alarm_control
documentation: Control the alarm of a specific vehicle.
A wrapper around the API used by the Lucid mobile apps
